leadText: Bond Bridge (Japanese: きずなばし Bond Bridge) is an area of the Sevii Islands located on Three Island, connecting its two "parent" and "child" islands. It has a few Trainers in it, and many patches of tall grass, but it is an easy walk between Three Island and Berry Forest.

sections.title: Route description
sections.text: Route description [ edit | edit source ] Leaving the town of Three Island through its western entrance, Trainers can follow the path presented before them all the way up the small hill, or if they have a Pokémon with Cut on them, can take a shortcut. After finding some way to get around this obstacle, Trainers will walk across a beach to a small bridge across to an islet with the entrance to Berry Forest.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Max Repel On the rock northwest of Aroma Lady Violet (hidden) FR LG Pearl In the corner southwest of Tuber Alexis (hidden recurring item ; group B) FR LG Stardust One square west and two squares north of the northwest corner of the bridge (hidden recurring item ; group B) FR LG
